title: Newport Gas For Lighters 300ml Compatible with All Lighters BBQ, Candle, Camping, Gas, Kitchen, Cooking Lighter - Pack of 2 x 300ml
features: Lighters are suitable to light up Barbecue, gas stove, candle, Cookers, Fireworks, and camping.
KARRMA Newport Lighter Gas is extra purified, brighter and cleaner than other lighter fluids on the market.
Also offers a unique cap with multi-coloured adapter system and two free universal flints which can fill every known refillable gas lighter in the world.
It has near zero impurities, Purified more than 7X, Odorless, Highly recommended for torch lighters
Keep your torch lighter or product clean and running clear with KARRMA Newport gas Zero impurities keeps the flame clean!
description: Product Description Universal Compatibility with All Gas Lighters Works effortlessly with kitchen, candle, BBQ, camping, and refillable gas lighters. Premium Butane Gas for Reliable Performance High-purity Newport butane ensures consistent flame and smooth ignition every time. Safe & Leak-Proof Refill Bottles Designed with a secure nozzle and leak-resistant valve for mess-free refills. Odorless & Clean-Burning Formula Enjoy a smokeless, odorless flame ideal for indoor and outdoor use. 2-Pack Value – 600ml Total Capacity Great value with 2 x 300ml bottles, offering long-lasting fuel for frequent use Ideal for Kitchen & Cooking Lighters Perfect for gas stoves, cooking torches, and other kitchen lighters. Perfect for BBQ & Outdoor Activities Fuel your grills, fire pits, and camping gear with dependable butane gas. Compatible with Candle & Decorative Lighters Refill decorative lighters used for candles, incense, and ambiance lighting.
